You are working on a Flutter app. Your task is to implement **Communication, Contracts, and Payments features** for the **Venue Owner / Staff Dashboard ONLY**.

---

🚨 STRICT CONSTRAINTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE):

* ONLY modify files related to Venue Owner / Staff functionality
* DO NOT edit OrganizerDashboard, AttendeeDashboard, or any unrelated screens
* DO NOT modify global theme, styles, or shared components
* ALL UI must strictly follow the existing theme (colors, typography, spacing, border radius)
* DO NOT break existing booking or authentication logic
* You MAY create new models, widgets, and services, but they must remain isolated to venue/staff features

---

# 🎯 GOAL

Upgrade the Venue Owner dashboard into a **business-ready platform** by adding:

1. Communication system (chat + notifications)
2. Contracts & document management
3. Payments & billing system

---

# 💬 1. COMMUNICATION SYSTEM

## A. Chat with Event Organizers

Implement a simple **in-app messaging system** between:

* Venue Owner (staff)
* Event Organizer

### Features:

* Chat per booking (1:1 conversation)
* Messages include:

  * text
  * timestamp
  * sender (owner or organizer)

### UI:

* Chat screen (opened from booking details)
* Message bubbles:

  * align left/right based on sender
* Input field + send button

---

## B. Booking Notes / Instructions

Each booking should support:

* Internal notes (visible to staff only)
* Instructions for organizer (visible to organizer)

### UI:

* Add notes section inside booking details
* Editable text fields

---

## C. Notifications System

Implement in-app notifications for:

* New booking request
* Booking cancellation
* Upcoming event reminder

### Requirements:

* Notification list UI (inside dashboard)
* Each notification includes:

  * title
  * short message
  * timestamp

Optional:

* Badge indicator (unread count)

⚠️ Keep it simple (no push notifications required yet)

---

# 🧾 2. CONTRACTS & DOCUMENTS

## A. Auto-Generated Booking Agreements

When a booking is confirmed:

* Generate a simple agreement document (text-based)

Include:

* Event details
* Venue details
* Date & time
* Pricing summary
* Terms & conditions

### UI:

* “View Agreement” button in booking details
* Display in a scrollable modal or screen

---

## B. Document Upload

Allow venue owners to upload:

* Licenses
* Permits
* Certificates

### Requirements:

* File picker (local files)
* Store file metadata (name, type)

### UI:

* “Documents” section in dashboard
* List of uploaded files

---

## C. Terms & Conditions per Venue

Each building/venue should support:

* Custom terms & conditions text

### UI:

* Editable field in building settings
* Used in agreement generation

---

# 💳 3. PAYMENTS & BILLING

## A. Payment Integration (Mock or Stripe-ready)

Implement structure for:

* Accepting payments

If real integration is complex:

* Simulate payment success/failure

---

## B. Payment Tracking

Each booking should include:

* Payment status:

  * pending
  * paid
  * refunded

---

## C. Invoice Generation

Generate invoice for each booking:

Include:

* Booking details
* Room + building
* Pricing breakdown
* Total amount

### UI:

* “View Invoice” button
* Display in modal or new screen

---

## D. Refund Handling

Allow:

* Mark booking as refunded
* Update payment status

---

# 🧩 4. FILE STRUCTURE

Create modular files:

### models/

* message_model.dart
* notification_model.dart
* document_model.dart
* invoice_model.dart
* payment_model.dart

### services/

* chat_service.dart
* notification_service.dart
* document_service.dart
* payment_service.dart

### widgets/

* chat_screen.dart
* message_bubble.dart
* notification_list.dart
* document_list.dart
* invoice_view.dart

---

# 🎨 5. UI / THEME REQUIREMENTS

ALL UI must:

* Use existing colors (e.g., dark primary, light background)
* Use same border radius (12)
* Use same input fields and button styles
* Maintain consistent spacing
* Look like a natural extension of current dashboard

DO NOT introduce new design systems.

---

# ⚙️ 6. FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS

Must support:

✔ Chat between venue owner and organizer
✔ Booking notes and instructions
✔ Notification list for booking events
✔ View generated agreements
✔ Upload and manage documents
✔ Add terms per venue
✔ Track payment status
✔ View invoices
✔ Handle refunds (basic logic)

---

# 🚫 DO NOT

* Do NOT modify other dashboards
* Do NOT refactor unrelated services
* Do NOT introduce breaking API changes
* Do NOT overcomplicate state management

---

# ✅ EXPECTED RESULT

A **professional Venue Owner system** where:

* Owners can communicate with organizers
* Contracts and documents are managed cleanly
* Payments and invoices are tracked
* UI is consistent with the app’s theme
* All features are modular and scalable

---

Focus on:

* clean architecture
* modular components
* production-quality UI
* maintainability
